ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., guard, forward, center) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the main referee */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "quarter_scores" TEXT /* JSON array of scores for each quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games_players" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "starter" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player started the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_players" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the player was with the team */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
